members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: Standard white duplex electrical outlet mounted low on the beige wall just above the white baseboard molding. Outlet appears unused and clean, positioned to the right of the framed sign and left of the first stair riser.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: below the light switches and to the left of the stairs' first riser
